message:
feat(cli): --attention-cursor flag for dashboard and overlay commands

Propagate attention cursor through the CLI → dashboard → overlay chain
so popup mode can open pre-focused on a specific attention feed item.

Dashboard (cli/dashboard.go):
- New --attention-cursor flag on dashboard command
- runDashboard() passes cursor through RunWithOptions(RunOptions{})
- Collapsed separate RunPopup/Run branches into single RunWithOptions

Overlay (cli/overlay.go, overlay_test.go):
- overlay command gains --attention-cursor flag
- launchOverlayPopup() accepts attentionCursor int64
- New overlayPopupInnerCommand() helper builds the inner command string
  with optional --attention-cursor N
- Test verifies inner command string includes the cursor argument

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
